notes: Very low FPS, at least in my case. It makes impossible to play and causes dizziness.

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050 Ti Laptop GPU
notes:
The game launches fine and menus work fine. Playing the tutorial the game runs butter smooth. However, it's currently not possible to actually join a match. Matchmaking works, however while joining the match I get an error message that reads "Could not connect to network!" and I get dropped back to the main menu.

My best guess is EAC is currently not configured to allow linux players and is intervening.
